results.raw_response:
A

The correct answer is A: V-V-V. All three statements are true according to the context provided. The neuropsychological assessment in children helps identify brain injury when the cause is uncertain, evaluates the extent and nature of difficulties to guide intervention, and assesses the impact of rehabilitation strategies on neuropsychological functioning.
